signatures: search(key: string, libraryUuid?: string, classification?: ILIB_ClassificationIndex | Array<string>, itemsOfPage?: number, page?: number): Promise<Array<ILIB_PanelLibrarySearchItem>>
returnSummary:

params.name: libraryUuid
